queries.question: Provide a list of all psychologists and also provide a list of psychiatrists from Harmony Wellness Center.
queries.sql:
SELECT Employees.FullName
FROM Employees
WHERE Employees.Mental_Health_Career = "Psychologist" OR Employees.Mental_Health_Career = "Psychiatrist" AND Employees.Clinic = "Harmony Wellness Center"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?employees a :Employees .
  ?employees p:name ?fullname .
  ?employees p:Mental_Health_Career ?mental_health_career_w .
  ?employees p:Mental_Health_Career ?mental_health_career_w2 .
  ?employees p:Clinic ?clinic_w .
  FILTER((STR(?mental_health_career_w) = "Psychologist" || (STR(?mental_health_career_w2) = "Psychiatrist" && STR(?clinic_w) = "Harmony Wellness Center")))
}

queries.question: Show me psychologists and psychiatrists from Harmony Wellness Center.
queries.sql:
SELECT Employees.FullName
FROM Employees
WHERE (Employees.Mental_Health_Career = "Psychologist" OR Employees.Mental_Health_Career = "Psychiatrist") AND Employees.Clinic = "Harmony Wellness Center"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?employees a :Employees .
  ?employees p:name ?fullname .
  ?employees p:Mental_Health_Career ?mental_health_career_w .
  ?employees p:Mental_Health_Career ?mental_health_career_w2 .
  ?employees p:Clinic ?clinic_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?mental_health_career_w) = "Psychologist" || STR(?mental_health_career_w2) = "Psychiatrist")) && STR(?clinic_w) = "Harmony Wellness Center"))
}
